message:
fix: use errors.New for Jira sentinel error, add Jira tracker tests

ErrNotImplemented was using fmt.Errorf (mutable); switch to errors.New.
Add tracker_test.go for Jira covering registration, ref handling, and
stub method behavior for parity with Linear/GitLab test coverage.
